title: InvSee
description: Adds possibility to open enderchest using /ec, open craft /craft, see inventories /invsee (player)
body:
A simple mod that allows you to use your enderchest/crafting table anywhere by typing /ec,  /craft
![usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a98c8c0e868fc49ad824b7ef4ba69f434852f77.png)


Commands:

-/Invs help

-/Invs options



-/ec

-/ec <player>



-/craft



-/invsee <player>





Default Settings:

By default, the /ec and /craft can be reached by all. /Invsee and /ec <name> are only reachable for Operators.






This mod is Server Side, which means that you can not use it on servers where its not installed
